note: Single source of truth for the test-target wall. Edit here; the site renders from this and CI checks it against README.md (scripts/check-targets-drift.mjs). Mirror of README → Test targets.

buckets.label: 0G App Suite
buckets.focus: Focus: onboarding, wallet connect, the main journey end to end. The richest bugs hide in repeat-user behavior — stale-session re-entry, captcha/token-expiry resubmits, reusing one wallet across apps, mid-flow Chain ID switches.
buckets.notice: Double deliverable — App Suite testers submit a bug report AND the dedicated 0G Studio Feedback form. One Feedback form covers all four apps.

items.name: 0G App
items.desc: Flagship app builder, live on mainnet

items.name: Genome
items.desc: Paste a URL/screenshot → production-grade design DNA

items.name: PandaClaw
items.desc: Agent launchpad + skill marketplace (Hermes + OpenClaw harness)

buckets.label: 0G Infra
buckets.focus: Focus: correctness, not polish — bridge / swap / faucet (stop at the confirm screen), explorer data accuracy, RPC / Chain ID handling, and 0g-cc's inference + storage paths.

items.name: 0G Code to Coin (0g-cc)
items.desc: Official MCP server → 0G Compute. CLI, not a web app. claude mcp add 0g-cc npx @0gfoundation/0g-cc
items.note: Testing it doubles as the primary 0G Private Computer Feedback deliverable.

buckets.label: Ecosystem dApps
buckets.focus: Confirm it loads + connects a wallet on 0G, walk the main flow once, log obvious breakage. Bugs here are not on 0G's account.

buckets.label: Hackathon dApps
buckets.focus: Same as Ecosystem — does it load, connect, and run its core flow on 0G? Log what's clearly broken; no deep-dive.
